OverviewLab TestsMedicines

Clinical Workspace

Overview

A specialized clinical interface built for speed and precision. Navigate through modular workflows to search, review, and validate medical prescriptions with confidence.

System v1.2

Standard Workflow

01

Intake & Search

Identify clinical targets using high-performance search modules.

02

Clinical Review

Analyze product details and verify dose template alignment.

03

Risk Validation

Execute safety checks against the live contraindication engine.

Core Modules

Lab Test Explorer

Browse and filter active lab tests with real-time PostgreSQL integration.

Launch Module

Medicine Intelligence

Deep search across brands, generics, and specialized dose templates.

Launch Module

Safety Validator

Advanced check for drug interactions, pregnancy, and lactation risks.

Launch Module

Clinical Guide

Contextual medicine suggestions based on validated disease profiles.

Launch Module
